instruction: Building a house step by step (step 2 of 6). So far you've drawn: ground. Add the next part: rect (x=28, y=56, width=72, height=56, fill #e3c084) with id "walls".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="116" x2="120" y2="116" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <line id="ground" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x1="8" y1="116" x2="120" y2="116" />
  <rect id="walls" fill="#e3c084" x="28" y="56" width="72" height="56" />
</svg>
